title: coelachne perpusilla var. simpliciuscula
intro: Coelachne perpusilla var. simpliciuscula, commonly known as the simple grass or lesser coelachne, is a type of grass native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and fever. The health benefits of Coelachne perpusilla var. simpliciuscula include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating fever. Coelachne perpusilla var. simpliciuscula can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
